mapper.select:
SELECT id, subject_id, 'SUBJECTIVE' as card_type, question as front_text, answer as back_text, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM subjective_problems WHERE subject_id = (SELECT id FROM subject WHERE name = #{category})
UNION ALL
SELECT id, subject_id, card_type, front_text, back_text, explanation, null as difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM learning_card WHERE subject_id = (SELECT id FROM subject WHERE name = #{category}) ORDER BY id
